comment: Canonical machine-readable manifest of the Inventory admin MCP tool surface. Two servers must expose exactly these tools: the EMBEDDED HTTP server (this repo, src/Mcp/, wire names kebab-case with a -tool suffix, e.g. list-users-tool) and the STANDALONE stdio server (https://github.com/spdotdev/inventory-mcp, wire names snake_case, e.g. list_users). 'key' is the normalized logical name: strip the -tool suffix, kebab -> snake. Guards: tests/Feature/McpToolManifestTest.php (this repo) and the conformance test in inventory-mcp CI. Change this file and both guards together when the surface grows.
